summary: Iteration 8 testing complete - Both new features are working correctly: 1) Enhanced Reports with comprehensive filtering (date range, status, standard), 2) Modification Request mechanism allowing clients to request changes to proposals before accepting/rejecting

minor.issue: Fixed: AttributeError when filtering by standard on forms with null company_data
minor.fix_applied: Added null check for f.get('company_data') in server.py line 1762

issues: Minor hydration warning in console about <span> inside <option> - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Enhanced Reports filters panel has toggle button (data-testid='toggle-filters-btn') that shows/hides filters correctly
Date range filters (start/end date inputs) work with proper validation
Status filter dropdown includes all statuses including 'modification_requested'
Standard filter dropdown contains all ISO certification standards (ISO9001, ISO14001, etc.)
Apply filters button triggers API call to /api/reports/filtered with correct query params
Clear filters button resets all filters and refreshes data from default endpoints
Filtered results show standards breakdown card when filters are applied
Modification Request button (data-testid='request-modification-btn') visible on pending proposals
Modification modal has proper fields: comment (required) and requested_changes (optional)
Submit modification request updates proposal status to 'modification_requested' and creates admin notification
Proposals with modification_requested status show dedicated page with orange edit icon and client's comment

success_rate.backend: 100% - 15/15 tests passed after fixing null check bug
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - Used existing proposals for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully implemented and tested: 1) Enhanced Reports at /reports with filter panel including date range, status, and standard filters. Filter panel toggle via data-testid='toggle-filters-btn'. Apply/Clear buttons work correctly. 2) Modification Request mechanism on Public Proposal Page (/proposal/{access_token}). Button data-testid='request-modification-btn' opens modal with comment and requested_changes fields. Submitting creates notification for admin. Test tokens: pending proposal=d4a5fd8f-7c81-4453-a529-626b8c2bfe1a, modification_requested=4d2067ae-cc32-400b-8f69-3b14b28ba313

clear_filters_button.behavior: Resets all filters and reloads default data

bug_fixes_applied.issue: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' when filtering forms by standard
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added null check: f.get('company_data') before accessing certificationSchemes
bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: Some application forms have null company_data before client fills the form

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
